feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Emergence of Mandelbrot-like and Julia-like Structures in Parameter Slices of Rational Maps
entry.content:
Authors: PIS Navarro -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.21048, 2026

Abstract: We study complex one-dimensional parameter slices in a three-parameter family of rational maps with two free critical points, obtained by imposing the existence of periodic orbits with prescribed multipliers. Using explicit parametrizations, we ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Emergence of a non-bulk hexagonal Fe $ _2 $ S $ _2 $ single layer via phase transformation
entry.content:
Authors: A Safeer, W Beida, F Oberbauer, N Atodiresei... -arXivpreprintarXiv..., 2026

Abstract: Two-dimensional materials can stabilize crystal structures that are absent from their bulk counterparts, offering opportunities for materials design. Here, we report the synthesis of a previously unknown hexagonal Fe$_2$S$_2$ single layer with $\beta$-CuI ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Multi-Agent Empowerment and Emergence of Complex Behavior in Groups
entry.content:
Authors: T Shah, I Nemenman, D Polani, S Tiomkin -arXivpreprintarXiv:2604.21155, 2026

Abstract: ... In this work we study the emergence of behaviors driven by one such incentive, empowerment, specifically in the context of more than one agent. We formulate a principled extension of empowerment to the multi-agent setting, and demonstrate its ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)
